repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.simulation: ODE solvers Euler and RK4, numerical stability, Monte Carlo, physics engines, discretization error, vectorized sim loops, reproducibility and seeds, validation against analytical solutions
build a React dashboard with Tailwind CSS

retrieval_query: ode solver euler runge kutta rk4 numerical stability monte carlo physics engine discretization error vectorized simulation reproducibility seed analytical solution convergence

validation_smoke.name: code.simulation L3 validation smoke
signals: the solver reproduces a known analytical solution within the expected order-of-accuracy error
a convergence study shows error shrinking at the solver's theoretical rate as the step size decreases
Monte Carlo estimates converge toward the analytical expectation with shrinking confidence intervals as samples grow
the simulation produces identical results from a fixed seed across runs and platforms

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.simulation diagnosis smoke
signals: energy or magnitude growing without bound indicates an unstable step size for an explicit solver
results that change between runs at the same seed reveal nondeterminism from unordered parallel reductions
error that fails to shrink as the step size halves points to a discretization or order-of-accuracy bug
a Monte Carlo estimate that will not settle suggests too few samples or a high-variance estimator
a physics simulation gaining energy over time hints at a non-symplectic integrator for a conservative system
